text: I start at nine and I finish at six.
I am a commercial professional. I am not a broker.
She visits the brokers every month.
Paula, welcome to the team. So — what do you do, exactly?
I am responsible for large risks. I cover big companies — banks, factories, hospitals.
Big risks. Then you work with Sofia every day.
I do. Sofia manages the team. And you? What do you do here?
I am the analyst. I handle the numbers. I write the report every Monday.
Every Monday? Does Sofia read your report?
She does. She reads it on Monday, and she visits the brokers on Tuesday. She doesn't stay in the office.
She doesn't stay in the office — and now I visit the brokers with her.
Then your job is the client, and my job is the numbers. Welcome, Paula.
I am responsible for large risks.
I cover big companies — banks, factories, hospitals.
My manager is Sofia. She manages the commercial team.
Does she visit the brokers? Yes, she does.

Hi, Paula. David here. You ask me about Sofia — so, here it is. Sofia manages our team. She covers the south region, and she handles the big accounts with you. She starts early, she reads my report on Monday, and she visits the brokers on Tuesday. She doesn't stay in the office all week — never. One more thing, and this is important: she doesn't want a perfect report. She wants a clear one. Her door is always open. Ask her anything. See you Monday.

Good morning, Paula. Sofia here. Welcome to my team — our team now. Let me tell you who does what. David is our analyst: he handles the numbers, and his report comes to me every Monday. My job is the team and the south region. Your job is the client — the big ones. You cover large risks, and that is twenty years of your life, so I am not worried. I visit the brokers every month, and you come with me on Tuesday. My office is on the third floor. Come and ask. Welcome, Paula.
She doesn't stay in the office.
I am responsible for large risks.
She visits the brokers every month.
Does she visit the brokers? Yes, she does.
I cover big companies — banks, factories, hospitals.
My manager is Sofia. She manages the commercial team.
